title: Fix podman stop --all attempting to stop created ctrs
body:
Fixes #2993 

Ignore container state errors when trying to stop all containers. Probably more efficient than trying to filter based on state (less DB lookups, less potential for races)

LGTM but tests are not happy.
Tests are green aside from our known SELinux failures
Needs a rebase to get the SELinux fixes.
